author: y4rr
content: FIXED: gpu_svd_f32/f64 and gpu_qr_f32/f64 in backend_impl.rs were bouncing through host Vec<T> — 4 host<->device copies per SVD call, 3 per QR. Added gpu_svd_f32_dev / gpu_svd_f64_dev / gpu_qr_f32_dev / gpu_qr_f64_dev in cusolver.rs: accept &CudaBuffer<T>, return CudaBuffer<T> outputs, zero host bounce. Row<->col-major conversions via gpu_transpose_2d (existing on-device PTX). R extraction and Q column extraction via new on-device PTX kernels (extract_upper_tri_colmaj_f32/f64, extract_cols_colmaj_f32/f64). backend_impl.rs svd_f32/f64 and qr_f32/f64 now call _dev variants. Conforms with torch.linalg.svd/qr on CUDA returning CUDA tensors (§3). 8 conformance tests pass, 5 probe tests pass.
